config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text:
An isolated person learning how all that "dumb shit" is making us work will never be successful again if we try hard enough for each other. In my time I have felt helpless because many times they wouldn't listen or speak on their behalf even though one voice spoke directly against them (I always kept track with what was said), especially when those voices were loud too loudly while others had no choice except laugh at me over such miscellaneous issues as lackadaisical thinking etc…

[1]: 'And God told you! The world would fall into chaos soon.' A story about two people
